data.body:
42d1 GROUNDWORK (config-surface Explore done). Design locked:
- New loader (mirror src/rebar/llm/criteria/overlay.py): .rebar/trusted_environments.yaml via yaml.safe_load; fail-OPEN when absent (returns None/no-required-env), located-error (naming path) on malformed via yaml.YAMLError wrapper; sha256 signature for lru cache-invalidation. First .rebar/ YAML overlay (others are JSON).
- Config: add verify.require_environment (str env_id | None, default None) to VerifyConfig (_config_schema.py:208) + coercer in _SECTIONS['verify'] (:484). Env override REBAR_VERIFY_REQUIRE_ENVIRONMENT auto-derived.
- required-env check fn: load pinned keyring for env_id from config; if env not pinned -> fail; else verify op-cert against PINNED keyring via 368c verify_opcert (NOT cert self-claimed keyid). Reuse authorship.allowed_signers_from_keys for rendering (keys sourced from file, not show_ticket).
- 42d1 SCOPE stops at loader+check fn+config field; the merge-gate that INVOKES it in CI is 4214.
- Tests model: tests/unit/test_criteria_overlay.py (_make_repo writes .rebar/ file) + test_config_typed.py.
STATUS: 42d1 plan-review running (b8oc3as08); change 649 (368c) no votes yet (CI pending). Building 42d1 on top of 368c once its review PASSES.
